reviews.title: Was okay.
reviews.positives: Breakfast services were good and location was good.
reviews.negatives:
Subject: Urgent concern about flooding and sanitation at the hotel entrance
Dear Novotel Goa Panjim,
I am writing to report a serious issue we encountered during our stay on [02 Jan 2026].
After a smooth check-in and settling into our room, we went out for a quick dinner. Upon returning, our taxi dropped us on the street directly in front of the hotel. To our surprise, the entire drop-off/pick-up area was heavily flooded with what appeared to be sewer/drainage water.
This created an unsanitary and unsafe situation. We had no choice but to step through the water to reach the entrance, and our shoes were soaked; we ultimately had to discard them. This experience was distressing and far below expected standards for safety and hygiene.
We request:
•	An explanation of the incident and immediate measures taken to address the flooding and sanitation.
•	Assurance that proper drainage, cleaning, and preventive maintenance are in place to avoid recurrence.
•	Appropriate compensation for the damaged shoes and the inconvenience caused.

Please let us know the next steps and whom to contact for resolution. We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.
Sincerely, 
Frank Camilo
Cell: +1 437 778 0791
Email: camilofrank@gmail.com

Reservation Number: 5154014498
Dates of Stay: 
Check-in:
Fri 2 Jan 2026	Check-out: Wed 7 Jan 2026

reviews.title: Extremely Disappointed
reviews.text: This hotel looks quite lavish outside but inside everything is quite opposite including casino. Breakfast is not having much Tiffin options and dosa is also not good. Finally, staff is also not so polite
reviews.response:
Dear Ajay,

We’re sorry to hear that your experience did not meet expectations. Your feedback on the breakfast variety, food quality, and staff service is valuable and will be shared with our team. 


Best Regards,
Team Novotel Goa Panjim
reviews.room_type: Superior Room with 1 double bed, with Balcony

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Breakfast was excellent. Location is also good.
reviews.negatives: Some of the staff behaviour is worst.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
We stayed here recently and honestly felt the room size was very small, making it less comfortable than expected. The sliding bathroom doors were not appropriate and didn’t provide much privacy. Considering the facilities, it didn’t feel worth the money charged.

On a positive note, the staff were absolutely superb — very friendly, attentive, and helpful throughout our stay. Their service was the highlight of the experience.

Overall, while the staff were excellent, the room design and value for money were disappointing
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,

Thank you for your feedback. We’re glad our team’s service stood out, though we regret the room design did not meet your expectations. Your comments are valuable, and we hope to welcome you again.


Best Regards,
Team Novotel Goa Panjim
reviews.room_type: Superior Room with 1 double bed, with Balcony

reviews.title: My Go To Place To Stay in Panjim
reviews.positives:
Great Location. Easy access to all parts of Panjim and there are enough taxi stands available nearby. The hotel is spotlessly clean. And the room was comfortable. Decent selection of amenities too. Also the breakfast buffet selection was very nice.

Opted for a spa treatment package as I had a discount coupon through my reservation on booking. The treatment was very nice.
reviews.negatives: Nothing much. Just that the hot water temperature in the shower cubicle is set to 38°C. Which at times is not sufficient for a good hot water bath.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
I had the best stay at Novotel Goa Panjim while celebrating my anniversary. 

Check-in was smooth, and the executive room was impressively decorated and very comfortable.

The staff were warm and cordial throughout, and the breakfast spread was excellent in both taste and variety. 

The location is fantastic in a prime part of Panjim, making it easy to get around. 

An added highlight was the casino on the ground floor, where, as a first-time visitor, I found the staff very helpful and patient. 

Thanks to the entire team for making our stay truly memorable.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room with 1 double bed, with Balcony

reviews.positives: The room, the pool, the spa, the buffet, the restaurant, the lobby bar, the location, the staff. Honestly, I was very happy with everything.
reviews.negatives:
I did not like the casino, it was small and closed in and had no women. But, I didn't come for the casino so I just left and didn't go back. Also, from the hotel, you forget the casino is there - it's in the back and downstairs - so not an issue. 
Also, when we were leaving, we asked the concierge to help us call a taxi and they told us there were plenty at street level, so we had to walk down with our suitcases. I would have preferred if they had a way to call a taxi up to the entrance since we had our suitcases.

reviews.title: Mein bisher schönstes Hotel.
reviews.positives:
Ein ganz tolles neues Hotel, das eigentlich 6 Sterne verdienen würde. Es hat einfach alles gepasst. Habe schon in hunderten Hotels weltweit meine Urlaube verbracht, aber dieses Hotel ist das allerbeste. Im Zimmer befindet sich sowohl eine große Badewanne, eine Dusche, als auch ein WC. Das Frühstücksbuffet ist sowohl für Inder, als auch internationale Gäste geeignet und reichhaltig. Sehr praktisch finde ich, dass es nur rund 500 m zum Busbahnhof und 800 m in die Altstadt sind. Das Personal hilft stets 


hervorragend.
reviews.negatives: In 100m Entfernung befindet sich noch für ein paar Wochen eine Großbaustelle, wo vor allem das Reinschlagen von Piloten großen Lärm verursachte, und zwar Tag und Nacht. Am gestrigen hohen Feiertag Diwali war zwar kein Baulärm, dafür wurde mit vielen Knallkörpern gefeiert. Die Blumen und Sträucher auf den Balkonen sind zwar schön, doch fällt viel Mist davon in den darunter liegenden Pool, sodass der Pool ständig gereinigt werden muss. Der digitale Zimmerschlüssel auf meinem Android Mobiltelefon hat zwar nicht funktioniert, aber das war auch nicht nötig. Schwierig ist es eine indische SimCard zu kaufen, weil diese gibt es nur am Market und dauert lange. Dazu ist ein Foto des Verkäufers und des Käufers notwendig und viele Angaben, wie zum Beispiel Name des Vaters. Die Kosten für 1,5 GB halten sich aber mit rund € 12 dafür in Grenzen.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: I had taken my mom dad for a quick getaway at the newly opened Novotel Goa. Extremely impressed with the friendly staff and overall hospitality service. Would like to mention Ankita Majumdar who was the Duty manager during our stay. She was extremely helpful, with a positive attitude and super friendly. Recommend to ask for her if you are staying!
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,

Thank you for choosing Novotel Goa Panjim for your family getaway and for sharing such lovely feedback! We’re delighted to hear that you were impressed with our hospitality and that Ankita made your stay even more special with her positive attitude and friendly service. 

We look forward to welcoming you and your family back for another memorable stay!


Best Regards,
Surajit Chatterjee
General Manager

reviews.title: Prima
reviews.positives: Fijn hotel, met fijn personeel en alles wel prima. Om aan te bevelen.
reviews.negatives: Het zou handig zijn als ze een beschrijving op papier  hebben van de omgeving en wat te doen. En een beschrijving vd faciliteiten in het hotel, dit is wel op internet beschrijving en op de tv. Hotel is 5 sterren waardig.

reviews.title: LOOK NO  FURTHER
reviews.text:
I will save  my time and energy in looking for hotels In Panaji.
I had booked 2 rooms for 2 days in another hotel with no elevator .
Cancelled few days before arriving .
Thank god and god is a witness  my family members would not have been happy with other place .
For $23.00 per day more I  was extremely happy with service at every step from entering hotel, checking in , dining ,breakfast . ETC ETC 
A C , HOT WATER  ROOM SIZE , BATHROOMS BIG,  PERFECT .
Food bit expensive was worthy of  paying with service .
Their morning breakfast was electorate  , filter coffee  supurb.
I had no problem at any step
reviews.response:
Dear Girish,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your positive experience at Novotel Goa Panjim. We are delighted to hear that you found our service exemplary from the moment you arrived, and that the accommodations met your expectations in terms of comfort and amenities.

We strive to provide value through high-quality dining experiences, and it’s gratifying to know that you found the breakfast and coffee to be superb. Your satisfaction is our priority, and we are thrilled that your family enjoyed their stay with us.

We look forward to welcoming you back in the future.

Best regards,
Surajit Chatterjee 
General Manager

reviews.negatives: Nada a mencionar!

reviews.title: New hotel,spacious rooms and good food.
reviews.text:
We stayed here for 2 nights and had a lovely stay. The hotel seems quit new,the room was spacious and very clean. The location is just a 10 minute walk to the centre of Panjim.
Since we  had a half board package,we had our breakfast and diner at the hotel. Both were equally good with ample choice,excellent quality fresh food and also plenty of continental food choices.While the reception staf were ok the staff at the restaurant on the first day of our stay seemed quite desinterested. 
On the 2nd day the staff were lovely,especially Prithi. 
Something we see a lot in India unfortunately,is small children at restaurants using a smartphone for gaming or videos with speakers on full blast. Ruining the dining experience of other guests.

- laid back service
- u ask for something , u need to give several reminders
- to empty room ul gt 60 calls starting from 6 am as if you are gonna leave property even thought payment is done n secured

reviews.title: Horrible...
reviews.positives: Horrible...
reviews.negatives: Electricity failure in room after every 15mins.

reviews.title: Disappointing stay! Muddy water, Faulty AirCon, Lizard in room. Zero Service recovery
reviews.negatives: Muddy brown water from the hot water tap in the basin. Complained to front desk and they sent someone ti fix this while I was away. Air con panel and TV not working as such was freezing in the night and could not watch any TV - sensors had to be replaced. Lizard dropped on me when I drew the curtains. Nothing was done by the staff for any service recovery.  Not what I had expected at a new hotel and with paying a premium price (over INR 14 K a night) for the room. I filled in feedback form and was assured that the Guest Experiences team would reach out to me but haven’t heard back from them.

reviews.title: No value for money
reviews.positives: Food was a big drawback... yuck!!!!!
reviews.negatives: Disgusting food

reviews.title: The property looked very impressive on the outside but underneath that there are a few horror's.
reviews.positives: The room was a very suitable size and I was able to relax well, which was the main reason for my stay. The bathroom was great, it had all the amenities that I needed. Wifi was very good and I was able to catch up with family very easily via video calls.
reviews.negatives: There was rubbish and dirt under the wardrobe area, the balcony was dirty and didn't look as though it had been cleaned ever. The view from my balcony was of a building site which I could also hear until very late. When I checked in I asked if dinner was still available and I was told by Ajay that it wasn't, so when I ordered room service and then got told that the buffet was still on, but by that point it was a bit late and I just wanted food and then get into bed. The TV in the room kept coming up with a message to update it, and when I mentioned it to reception someone came up, but didn't do anything about it.

reviews.title: Not worth your money
reviews.positives: I like balcony and bathroom
reviews.negatives: Staff are very amateur; I guess they came directly from college without any experience. Very bad service. If you open the balcony door, mosquitoes will eat you alive.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Not good
reviews.negatives: Staff , slow service

reviews.title: Waste of money!
reviews.positives:
The location of the hotel is central and getting local cabs to this hotel is easy! 
Room service food is decent!
reviews.negatives:
So many things
1. Broken jet spray wasn’t fixed even after telling 3 times
2. Noises all thru the night by very uncouth occupants in the hotel 
3. Class of people were really very bad for a hotel that charges 12k+ a night. Was full of uneducated and boisterous male occupants. 
4. Didn’t feel safe at all inside the hotel
5. Staff doesn’t really care who is coming and going
6. Hygiene is average 
7. Not great for solo female travellers 
8. Lights kept going out and back up power was not immediate 
9. Staff in the restaurant expect solo women in the restaurant to share a community table even when there are adequate empty tables 
10. Not value for money at all, there are much better boutique hotels for lesser money! 
11. Breakfast spread is 80% Indian food and not flavourful. The cold cuts are all stale. Don’t touch the smoked salmon at all! It was brown and had gone dry!

reviews.title: Not a holiday hotel
reviews.positives: Fairly new property with very helpful staff. Location was central to Panjim.
reviews.negatives:
The property was showing sign of age or maybe lack of maintenance. We had 2 rooms and these were the issues with the rooms:

1. Auto lights - It has an annoying motion sensor light system which is meant to switch the lights off when no one is in the room. But randomly switches  on all the lights in the middle of the night. This happens at least 3 times a night in each room. 
2. The ironing board was broken and the iron wouldn’t heat up - with a loud beep, in one room. 
3. Aircond was not cold and the rooms never reached dropped below 23.5C. 
4. Fridges in both rooms didn’t work. 
5. Water gets out of the shower door in both rooms so the bathroom is wet. 
6. The queen room had frosted glass doors for the shower and toilet cubicles but the twin share had clear glass. Maybe it should be the other way around.

It’s located in the CBD so not the best location for leisure. A bit of a messy spot. I think if you are in Goa for business, you may stay there.

reviews.title: Overpriced.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was decent
reviews.negatives: The area was awful. So loud. The pool area was full of mosquitoes. The hotel price was extortionate.

reviews.title: Not bad but definitely not for families
reviews.positives: The food in the restaurant near the reception was good
reviews.negatives: It’s definitely not a family friendly hotel. Drunk people having stag parties and coming in and out of the casino that is on the lobby floor.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: There is nothing I like about novotel Goa panjim
reviews.negatives: breakfast was not good, especially southindian items were not at all tasty, and also ambience is not as expected

reviews.title: Passable Stay
reviews.positives: The hotel is new and the infrastructure is very nice. Rooms are very modern and clean. Well designed hotel and rooms. Breakfast variety and taste is good with Indian and International options. Valet parking is helpful. Great safety measures with security checks.
reviews.negatives:
Service was unfortunately poor from 5 star standards. Encountered several issues: 1) There was no in-room dining menu or QR code in the room nor any details about spa. Requested an in-room dining menu 3-4 times to order some food but never received it. Eventually ended up eating from outside, 2) I had booked and paid the room for 3 but the room was only prepared for 2 considering all amenities (in some cases, just for one), Had to request items one by one again and again which was frustrating. Would expect a five star hotel to set these things up, 3) Wanted to keep our stuff in the luggage room but luggage "room" was an open space beside a pillar in the main corridor which doesn't seem secure at all, 4) Kettle wasn't working due to electrical issue and mini bar in the room was absolutely empty and had nothing to offer, 5) TV remote wasn't working (probably because of run out batteries), Fancy clock in the room wasn't working, 6) AC thermostat wouldn't go down below 23 degrees even if you set it to 19 degrees, 7) Only forks provided as cutlery on the breakfast table and had to request and chase for the remaining cutlery and even drinking water multiple times, there was a shortage of spoons clearly 
8) Got a room on 2nd floor facing the pool and there was loud music throughout the night which was frustrating. Lot of these issues were conveyed and in such a case, a 5 star hotel would try to compensate through compliments in some way or the other but all I got was a string of apologies and nothing tangible which was more frustrating.

This was a special visit but unfortunately left unsatisfied. Understand these might be considered small matters but the whole purpose of a 5 star experience is something premium which was unfortunately not delivered.

reviews.positives: The staff , the food
reviews.negatives:
You carpets should be cleaned after every check out , out room carpet was honestly dirty , really really sorry to say that . 

Noise proofing should be added to the rooms we could hear everything from morning to night , ( the construction work and the music ) 

Hard to sleep

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: Really good
reviews.negatives: More variety of fruits

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Staff friendliness, particularly Nibaran on the front desk.  Very professional, friendly and helpful.  Breakfast spread and staff was good too.
reviews.negatives: Bathroom sliding doors were a bit odd but got used to it!  Smell in the room was sometimes stong of mould/rotten.  Also noticeable in the hotel corridors so maybe something to do with air circulation.  I lost my jacket on day of checking out, and it took several days and chasing emails for the hotel to respond, which was disappointing.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Location 
Staff
Food
reviews.negatives: Price was high

reviews.title: Okayish
reviews.positives: Location and cleanliness
reviews.negatives: Untrained staff. Poor F&B service

reviews.title: Constant power tripping. Restaurant food and choices were limited. No great dining options
reviews.positives: Good location for business
reviews.negatives: Service,. Dinning options and food quality. Maintenance of rooms

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location & staff
reviews.negatives:
We had a 4am checkout so I ordered ham & cheese sandwiches for my wife and I.
One tiny sandwich which consisted of processed cheese spread a thin slice of ham (?)
Nothing else, not even water!
Disappointing.

reviews.title: Novotel lives up to its standards! Great stay
reviews.positives: Very comfortable and clean rooms. Housekeeping staff, bell boy, reception and overall staff at the hotel were very polite and helpful. Service was quick! I really appreciate the housekeeping staff for doing a good job with responding to requests for certain requirements and also laundry and ironing. The bathrooms were well equipped and comfortable to use. I slept well at the hotel. The breakfast buffet was excellent!
reviews.negatives: I just wish the pool was temperature controlled. We were really looking forward to going for a swim but the water in the pool was awfully cold.

reviews.title: Hospitality
reviews.positives: Location is excellent. Near by panjim bus station. Accessible to all locations with AC bus.market is reasonable with fresh fruits
reviews.negatives: Room service need to be improved.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The hotel was excellent, staff and all
reviews.negatives: The reusable water bottles wasn’t clean, we left our act for valet parking and when they returned our car had several scratches since it’s black colour, very disappointing

reviews.title: Would definitely choose this hotel again on my next trip.
reviews.positives: The property is new, clean and comfortable. The staff is helpful and friendly. They make an effort to make you comfortable. The location is good.
reviews.negatives: Work table in the room could be much better. Important for business travellers.

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.positives:
Excellent location.
Very good breakfast.
Staff
reviews.negatives:
After checking out we had to wait in the lounge for a few hours.
So I thought of visiting the casino, and was denied entry as I had just checked out.
It shows lake of flexibility as the customer is immediately treated like an outsider after checking out.

reviews.title: Overall we enjoyed at Novotel, It was relaxing and comfortable stay.
reviews.positives: Location, Room Size and Decor and In house Casino.
reviews.negatives: Guests should be allowed to use steam which was not the case.

reviews.title: Good high end hotel with all facilities.
reviews.positives: All facilities pool, casino , spa available. Good breakfast
reviews.negatives: Pillows could be better.

reviews.title: Good hotel. Breakfast was good but could be improved for a country like India where food is often outstanding
reviews.positives: Good

reviews.title: Wonderful stay for the family.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was amazing, the room was very nice, the staff were very friendly. The kids love the food in the restaurant and this became our default place to eat.
reviews.negatives: The pool was a little cold.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Food is good both brakfast and dinner we had

reviews.title: Very good comfortable stay
reviews.positives: Break fast was supreb with lot of options. Front desk was very helpful.
reviews.negatives: Location as per Goa is not beach side.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Staff were very caring, I asked for a antiseptic for a small cut, however, a staff showed with full first aid box and dressed the cut. I was touched by their warmth. Their buffet bfast was good and dinner a la Carte, even for a vegetarian.

reviews.title: We had a wonderful stay at the property. The staff was very friendly.thanks to Feli and Siddesh.
reviews.positives: The friendliness of the staff and their service.

reviews.title: Great Value for Money.
reviews.positives: Excellent Spread !
reviews.negatives: Carpet in the room was not clean....

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.positives: The property was clean and tidy. The staff is courteuos and attentive and friendly. The breakfast spread was good.
reviews.negatives: Higher floor wasn’t available. The live counter items were not that great . The parathas were undercooked and dosa was not that great in taste. But the other items than live counters were good. The room was a bit small as compared to other hotels i have stayed

reviews.title: Comfortable convenient location
reviews.positives: Staff was very courteous. We had a little problem with our door key which could not be sorted out hence shifted us to another room. Everything went swiftly except it took some time. But that could not be helped as it could happen anywhere. Well clean room housekeeping was very good.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was good but regional counters can be more authentic. Rest all was fine.

reviews.title: Excellent stay. I Recommend this Hotel
reviews.positives: Excellent Hotel. Great Breakfast Buffet.
reviews.negatives: Just the view outside from Balcony

reviews.title: Excellent hotel with good facilities and food as well as the staff.
reviews.positives: Very clean, staff courtesy and help when needed. Very good breakfast and general security.
reviews.negatives: The check in time should be a bit flexible for international passengers in view of flight arrivals.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Happy with our stay

reviews.title: Nice comfortable stay

reviews.title: New hotel, excellent location in Panaji. Room could have been slightly larger.
reviews.negatives: I thought that the portion sizes for orders in the restaurant were slightly small.

Staff was very kind and helpful especially the kitchen staff Priti, Kim, Baby, Fiostoma. 
They ensured that our baby and us were comfortable throughout our stay.
reviews.negatives: Hotel could give a toothbrush and toothpaste in separate packaging. Many toothbrushes were thrown in the dustbin because we only needed toothpaste.

reviews.title: Outstanding customer service. Thank you for looking after us.

reviews.title: Lovely stay
reviews.positives: Magnificent

reviews.title: Highly recommended hotel.
reviews.negatives: There was construction next door throughout the night. The staff was very apologetic since it is not the hotel's fault.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nice and pleasant stay
reviews.negatives: Room service

reviews.title: Absolutely excellent and great value for money!
reviews.positives:
What a surprise to find this stunningly beautiful hotel on our travels in India. I honestly could not understand how anyone could give it less than 10 out of 10. We were treated so well by all the kind staff, from our wonderful housekeeper to the security guards outside. Also every single staff member in the breakfast restaurant was absolutely outstanding. 
Breakfast has literally everything you could think of, it was the best hotel breakfast I’ve seen in a very, very long time. 
The pool is beautiful and the gym is excellent.
Our room was so nice, plenty of space, a bath and a nice balcony.
Well done to the team for making our stay so memorable. Wish we could have stayed longer!
reviews.negatives: It was a little noisy at night but that was down to our neighbours and the local dogs, not the fault of the hotel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The  ambience of room is very good and it's located in prime location .. it's very near to panjim busstand. The food is awesome..

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: Breakfast was excellent.
reviews.negatives: Room service required repeated reminders

reviews.title: Awesome Gen Next Property.
reviews.positives: Amazing Property. A sight to the eyes. Beautifully designed rooms. Vibrant. Perfect if you are looking for a Gen Next Property. Located at Panjim. Was perfect for out stay as we wanted a property at Panjim. The food was amazing. There is an in-house Casino too. So basically it’s an amazing property in Panjim about a km from all the main Casinos.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. Although there is a issue. But it is more about Goa than about the property. We do not get taxis/ autos easily outside the hotel.

reviews.title: Had a wonderful time
reviews.positives: Excellent staff and facility I highly recommend for couples, and families to stay over here …
reviews.negatives: Nothing…

reviews.title: Very comfortable and relaxing stay. Helped by a polite and courteous staff
reviews.positives: Breakfast was excellent. The staff super co operative. Made extra effort in providing item which was not on the breakfast menu on the second day of the stay.

reviews.title: A truly enjoyable stay.  I came for the Exposition of St Francis fulfilled my religious duty
reviews.positives:
Breakfast was good and fresh..
Variety of western and Indian options 
Rooms were clean and well maintained.
Location was central to our destinations. 
Most of the staff were exceptionally courteous and attentive. 
F&B staff Vishal and Berbinshi sorry not sure of the spelling.
reviews.negatives:
Counter staff some were helpful. 
All courteous however could have helped with taxi service App.. I wasn’t aware throughout my stay until I chance upon GOA miles and that made my traveling so much more affordable and convenient.
